descriptionShort: 2025 Richmond Sockeyes HOF banner-night reunion ceremony from March 13th featuring alumni speeches and commemorations.
descriptionLong: Footage from the 2025 Richmond Sockeyes banner-night and BC Hockey Hall of Fame reunion event held on March 13th. The video likely captures opening ceremonies, speeches from team alumni, and commemoration activities celebrating the 1987 Centennial Cup championship team's induction or honor.
